mapper.select: SELECT * FROM private_message WHERE -- 只查询两个用户之间的消息 ((from_user_id = #{userId1} AND to_user_id = #{userId2}) OR (from_user_id = #{userId2} AND to_user_id = #{userId1})) AND ( -- 如果当前用户是发送方，检查发送方删除标志 (from_user_id = #{userId1} AND deleted_by_sender = false) OR -- 如果当前用户是接收方，检查接收方删除标志 (to_user_id = #{userId1} AND deleted_by_recipient = false) ) ORDER BY create_time DESC

WITH ranked_messages AS ( SELECT pm.*, CASE WHEN pm.from_user_id = #{userId} THEN pm.to_user_id ELSE pm.from_user_id END AS opponent_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CASE WHEN pm.from_user_id = #{userId} THEN pm.to_user_id ELSE pm.from_user_id END ORDER BY pm.create_time DESC ) AS rn FROM private_message pm WHERE pm.from_user_id = #{userId} OR pm.to_user_id = #{userId} ), unread_counts AS ( SELECT opponent_id, SUM(CASE WHEN is_unread = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unread_count FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN pm.from_user_id = #{userId} THEN pm.to_user_id ELSE pm.from_user_id END AS opponent_id, CASE WHEN pm.to_user_id = #{userId} AND pm.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_unread FROM private_message pm WHERE pm.from_user_id = #{userId} OR pm.to_user_id = #{userId} ) AS msg_with_status GROUP BY opponent_id ) SELECT rm.opponent_id AS user_id, u.nickname AS username, u.avatar AS avatar, rm.content AS last_message, rm.create_time AS last_time, COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count FROM ranked_messages rm INNER JOIN users u ON rm.opponent_id = u.id LEFT JOIN unread_counts uc ON rm.opponent_id = uc.opponent_id WHERE rm.rn = 1 ORDER BY rm.create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM private_message WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId1} AND to_user_id = #{userId2}) OR (from_user_id = #{userId2} AND to_user_id = #{userId1}) AND ( -- 当前用户是发送方时，不显示自己删除的消息 (#{currentUserId} = #{userId1} AND deleted_by_sender = false) OR (#{currentUserId} = #{userId2} AND deleted_by_sender = false) OR -- 当前用户是接收方时，不显示自己删除的消息 (#{currentUserId} = #{userId1} AND deleted_by_recipient = false) OR (#{currentUserId} = #{userId2} AND deleted_by_recipient = false) ) ORDER BY create_time DESC
